source_policy.authoritative_priority: Use manufacturer manuals, owner manuals, official safety guidance, and text-based trade documentation as the script authority. Use YouTube only for blocking, shot rhythm, hand motion, and overlay placement.
source_policy.youtube_policy: Do not rehost or transform third-party footage into exported lesson videos without permission. Embed, link, or use as visual reference only.
source_policy.export_policy: Generated Seedance clips should be newly created scenes driven by text prompts, safety notes, and abstracted visual blocking rather than frame-copying source footage.
